name: Steadfast Group Limited
analysis: SDF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$5.1500, stop A$3.8709, target A$8.9873 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
